Class theWheel.oSelfLayout 

java.lang.Object
   |
   +----theWheel.oSelfLayout
public class oSelfLayout
extends Object
implements LayoutManager2
Class to represent a panel of theWheel.oView objects.

oSelfLayout()
Default constructor

addLayoutComponent(Component, Object)
Adds the specified Component, using the specified constraint Object.
addLayoutComponent(String, Component)
NOT IMPLEMENTED.
getLayoutAlignmentX(Container)
LayoutManager2 interface
getLayoutAlignmentY(Container)
LayoutManager2 interface
invalidateLayout(Container)
LayoutManager2 interface
layoutContainer(Container)
main(String[])
Usage: java oPanel
maximumLayoutSize(Container)
Returns the maximum size of the container.
minimumLayoutSize(Container)
Returns the minimum size of the container.
preferredLayoutSize(Container)
Returns the preferred size of the container.
removeLayoutComponent(Component)
Removes the specified Component from the layout, adjusting everything as needed.

oSelfLayout 
 public oSelfLayout()
Default constructor

addLayoutComponent 
 public void addLayoutComponent(String name,
                                Component comp)
NOT IMPLEMENTED. Use addLayoutComponent(Component,Object) instead.

See Also:
LayoutManager
addLayoutComponent 
 public void addLayoutComponent(Component comp,
                                Object constraints)
Adds the specified Component, using the specified constraint Object. oSelfLayout was designed to accept oComponent-derived components and oSpacer-derived constraints.

Parameters:
comp - Component (oComponent) to add.
constraints - Object (oSpacer) to use to constrain the Component.
See Also:
LayoutManager2
removeLayoutComponent 
 public void removeLayoutComponent(Component comp)
Removes the specified Component from the layout, adjusting everything as needed.

Parameters:
comp - Component (oComponent) to add.
constraints - Object (oSpacer) to use to constrain the Component.
See Also:
LayoutManager
preferredLayoutSize 
 public Dimension preferredLayoutSize(Container parent)
Returns the preferred size of the container.

Parameters:
parent - Container whose size to determine.
Returns:
The desired Dimension of the Container.
See Also:
LayoutManager
minimumLayoutSize 
 public Dimension minimumLayoutSize(Container parent)
Returns the minimum size of the container.

Parameters:
parent - Container whose size to determine.
Returns:
The minimum Dimension of the Container.
See Also:
LayoutManager
maximumLayoutSize 
 public Dimension maximumLayoutSize(Container parent)
Returns the maximum size of the container.

Parameters:
parent - Container whose size to determine.
Returns:
The maximum Dimension of the Container.
See Also:
LayoutManager2
getLayoutAlignmentX 
 public float getLayoutAlignmentX(Container target)
LayoutManager2 interface

getLayoutAlignmentY 
 public float getLayoutAlignmentY(Container target)
LayoutManager2 interface

layoutContainer 
 public void layoutContainer(Container parent)
invalidateLayout 
 public void invalidateLayout(Container target)
LayoutManager2 interface

main 
 public static void main(String args[])
Usage: java oPanel
